Name: EQUIP_PARAM_GOODS_ST
Description:
Defines an item, both consumable and key items.
Note that many key items are placebo and the item's effect is granted through scripting. Passive effects from ownership are not defined here.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Reference ID
Fields.Description: ID0 called from the item (default)

Fields.Name: SFX Variation ID
Fields.Description: Specify SFX variation (used to identify SFX in combination with TimeActEditor ID)

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: Weight [kg]

Fields.Name: Basic Price
Fields.Description: Basic price

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: Selling price

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Set the effect that occurs when using a tool

Fields.Name: Replace Item ID
Fields.Description: Item ID when replacing

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Sort ID (-1 Do not collect)

Fields.Name: Appearance Replace Item ID
Fields.Description: Conditionally replace the display with another tool ID. The tool ID on the game data side does not change

Fields.Name: Dialog Message ID
Fields.Description: YesNo Message ID used when displaying the dialog

Fields.Name: Use Enable SpEffect Type
Fields.Description: Allow to use only when the special effect of the set state change type is applied

Fields.Name: Pot Group ID
Fields.Description: Consumable items for which 0 or more is set for the pot group ID can be possessed by the number of pots with the same pot group ID.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Menu icon ID

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: Model ID

Fields.Name: Shop Level
Fields.Description: Level that can be sold at the store

Fields.Name: Achivement ID
Fields.Description: SEQ number of complete trophy

Fields.Name: Achivement Sequential ID
Fields.Description: Trophy SEQ number

Fields.Name: Max Amount
Fields.Description: Maximum number of possessions

Fields.Name: Consume Humanity
Fields.Description: Consumer nature

Fields.Name: Over Dexterity
Fields.Description: Skill over start value

Fields.Name: Goods Type
Fields.Description: Types of tools

Fields.Name: Reference Type
Fields.Description: ID category - Attack, Projectile, Special

Fields.Name: Quick Match Usage Restriction
Fields.Description: Controls when this item can be used during Quick Match multiplayer modes.

Fields.Name: Goods Use Animation
Fields.Description: Set the animation to play when using the tool

Fields.Name: Interaction Menu Type
Fields.Description: Menu type that opens when using an item

Fields.Name: Use Limit Category
Fields.Description: This item is usable if any active spEffect with the following spCategories are active.

Fields.Name: Replace Category
Fields.Description: Condition category to add to call ID

Fields.Name: Enable Host Player
Fields.Description: Is it possible to use a surviving player?

Fields.Name: Enable as Gray Phantom
Fields.Description: Can Gray Ghost be used?

Fields.Name: Enable as friendly phantom
Fields.Description: Is it possible to use this item as a friendly phantom? (Furled Finger, Hunter, Npc Furled Finger)

Fields.Name: Enable as Black Phantom
Fields.Description: Is it possible to use this item as a hostile phantom? (All types of Invaders, Duelist, Npc Invaders, Npc's, etc...)

Fields.Name: Enable in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Can it be used during multiplayer?

Fields.Name: Enable Online Only
Fields.Description: Is it unavailable while offline?

Fields.Name: Is Equippable
Fields.Description: Whether it can be equipped

Fields.Name: Is Consumed
Fields.Description: Will it be consumed when used (whether the number of possessions will decrease)

Fields.Name: Is Auto Equipped
Fields.Description: Will it be equipped automatically when picked up?

Fields.Name: Is Guidance Item
Fields.Description: Is it a stationary item?

Fields.Name: Is Unique Item
Fields.Description: Is it an item that you can only have one?

Fields.Name: Can Discard
Fields.Description: Can you throw away the item? TRUE = thrown away

Fields.Name: Can Deposit
Fields.Description: Can you leave it in the warehouse?

Fields.Name: Disable if Right Hand is Empty
Fields.Description: Can't be used when the right-handed weapon is bare-handed?

Fields.Name: Remove Item on Game Clear
Fields.Description: Whether to delete at the time of lap

Fields.Name: Is Regenerative Item
Fields.Description: Used to determine replenishable items

Fields.Name: Is Full Regenerative Item
Fields.Description: Used to determine replenished items

Fields.Name: Is Enhancement Item
Fields.Description: Do you want to enchant your weapon?

Fields.Name: Can Repair Item
Fields.Description: Is it an item to repair?

Fields.Name: Disable Dropping in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Is multi-drop sharing prohibited?

Fields.Name: Disable Usage in Multiplayer Arena
Fields.Description: Is it prohibited to use in the arena?

Fields.Name: Disable Usage outside of Multiplayer Arena
Fields.Description: Is it prohibited to use outside the arena?

Fields.Name: Can Cancel Application Early
Fields.Description: Is it possible to cancel early?

Fields.Name: Apply SpEffect Modifiers
Fields.Description: Whether to reflect special effects (such as ability value correction)

Fields.Name: Synchronized Item Usage ID
Fields.Description: When the number of items is changed, the items with the same ID will be changed at the same time. 0 Not synchronized

Fields.Name: Reference ID - Left Hand
Fields.Description: ID1 called from the item

Fields.Name: Weapon Reference ID
Fields.Description: Weapon ID to refer to when using the tool

Fields.Name: Vagrant Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: -1 No vagrant 0 No lottery 1  With lottery

Fields.Name: Vagrant Enemy Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: -1 No drop 0 No lottery 1  With lottery

Fields.Name: Vagrant Bonus Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: -1 No drop 0 No lottery 1  With lottery

Fields.Name: Usage VFX - Cast
Fields.Description: SFXID until the effect is activated when you try to use the item

Fields.Name: Usage VFX  - Activate
Fields.Description: SFX ID when the item is activated

Fields.Name: Usage VFX - Effect
Fields.Description: After the item is activated, the SFX ID in effect

Fields.Name: Usable with Great Rune Active
Fields.Description: Can it be used with a large rune activated?

Fields.Name: Is Bonfire Warp Item
Fields.Description: If the state change type Warp Prohibition is applied when TRUE, remove the function to disable the item.

Fields.Name: Enable on Ladder
Fields.Description: Check here for items available in the ladder

Fields.Name: Usable before Multiplayer Session
Fields.Description: Whether items can be used between session probability and initial synchronization

Fields.Name: Usable in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Can it be used together?

Fields.Name: Is Shield Enchantment
Fields.Description: Is it a shield enchantment?

Fields.Name: Is Warp Prohibited
Fields.Description: When this is TRUE, disable the item if the state change type Warp Prohibition is applied.

Fields.Name: Usable if Disconnect Penalty is Active
Fields.Description: A flag that allows you to determine if an item is only available when a client disconnect penalty is incurred.

Fields.Name: Regenerative Item Type
Fields.Description: Replenishment item / Replenishment type when replenishing a replenished item.

Fields.Name: Auto Replenishment Type
Fields.Description: Controls whether or not to automatically replenish and default settings

Fields.Name: Can be Dropped
Fields.Description: Can I put the item on the spot? TRUE = can be placed

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Log Condition Type
Fields.Description: Whether to display in the item acquisition log when acquiring the item (not entered )

Fields.Name: Is Horse Summon
Fields.Description: Is it an item that summons a horse? Cannot be used if the horse died or the PC is in a horse-prohibited area

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Dialog Condition Type
Fields.Description: Whether to display it in the item acquisition dialog when acquiring an item (not entered new only)

Fields.Name: Is Sleep Collection Item
Fields.Description: Is it a Nemuri collection item?

Fields.Name: Enabled while Riding
Fields.Description: Can it be used while riding?

Fields.Name: Disabled while Riding
Fields.Description: Is it prohibited to use while not riding?

Fields.Name: Max Number Stored in Itembox
Fields.Description: Number of warehouses

Fields.Name: Sort Group ID
Fields.Description: Sort item type ID. In the sort Item type order, the same ID is displayed together as the same group.

Fields.Name: Enabled in No Attack Region
Fields.Description: Can it be used in an attack-prohibited area?

Fields.Name: Replenish after quick match
Fields.Description: Should amount of this item be stored and replenished after quick match?

Fields.Name: Sale Value
Fields.Description: Selling price

Fields.Name: Rarity
Fields.Description: Rarity used in item acquisition logs

Fields.Name: Use Limit Category (Spirit Summon)
Fields.Description: This item is usable if any active spEffect with the following spCategories are active.

Fields.Name: Use Limit - SpEffect Type
Fields.Description: Specified to control whether it can be used depending on the state change type of the special effect applied

Fields.Name: AI Usage Judgment ID
Fields.Description: AI usage judgment ID

Fields.Name: FP Cost
Fields.Description: MP consumption

Fields.Name: HP Cost
Fields.Description: HP consumed

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Goods ID
Fields.Description: Strengthening tool ID

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Material ID
Fields.Description: Material ID at the time of strengthening

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Cost
Fields.Description: Enhanced price

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [0]
Fields.Description: Pledge 0 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [1]
Fields.Description: Pledge 1 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [2]
Fields.Description: Pledge 2 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [3]
Fields.Description: Pledge 3 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [4]
Fields.Description: Pledge 4 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [5]
Fields.Description: Pledge 5 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [6]
Fields.Description: Pledge 6 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [7]
Fields.Description: Pledge 7 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [8]
Fields.Description: Pledge 8 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [9]
Fields.Description: Pledge 9 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [10]
Fields.Description: Pledge 10 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [11]
Fields.Description: Pledge 11 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [12]
Fields.Description: Pledge 12 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [13]
Fields.Description: Pledge 13 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [14]
Fields.Description: Pledge 14 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level - Vow Level [15]
Fields.Description: Pledge 15 usage level

Fields.Name: Use Level
Fields.Description: Appropriate level of use

Fields.Name: Item Get Tutorial Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag ID for the tutorial when you first get the item. Flag ON when item is obtained.
